bugs.title: `sdkmath.Int.Int64()` overflow → EndBlocker panics → chain halt
bugs.detail_title: `AllocateBlockReward` — `sdkmath.Int.Int64()` overflow in EndBlocker → permanent chain halt

bugs.title: Empty group admin panic after `UnBondRegion` → chain halt
bugs.detail_title: `JoinGroup` & `procKycRegionChange` — empty group admin panic after `UnBondRegion` → chain halt

bugs.title: Silent `DelegateInterest` deduction skip → treasury accounting divergence
bugs.detail_title: `sendKycRewards` — silent `DelegateInterest` deduction skip → treasury accounting divergence

bugs.title: Off-by-one at halving boundaries → inflated delegation interest payments
bugs.detail_title: `getRewardsByHeight` — off-by-one errors at halving boundaries → inflated delegation interest payments

bugs.title: No solvency check → GlobalDAO can drain treasury below `DelegateInterest`
bugs.detail_title: `WithdrawFromRegion` — no solvency check allows GlobalDAO to drain treasury below `DelegateInterest` obligations

bugs.title: Wrong solvency formula → deposits accepted on insolvent treasury
bugs.detail_title: `DoFixedDeposit` — wrong solvency formula uses `regionShare` and `initAllocationFunds` not in actual interest calculation

bugs.title: Receiver hardcoded as sender address → funds permanently burned on destination chain
bugs.detail_title: `IbcTransferFromRegionTreasure` — receiver hardcoded as treasury address → funds sent to uncontrolled address, permanently burned

bugs.title: Wrong store key prefix → regional index never deleted, persistent storage leak
bugs.detail_title: `RemoveMeidNFT` — uses `account` instead of `regionId` as store prefix → regional index never cleaned, storage leak grows unboundedly

bugs.title: Rate change silently locks existing depositors from KYC region migration
bugs.detail_title: `SetFixedDepositCfgRate` — rate change when active deposits exist silently locks all depositors from KYC region migration

bugs.title: Old consensus address `SigningInfo` never deleted → slashing module storage leak
bugs.detail_title: `UpdateValidatorPubKey` — old consensus address `ValidatorSigningInfo` never deleted from slashing module → persistent storage leak

bugs.title: Same-region `MsgUpdate` inflates `FixedDepositAmount` indefinitely via self-transfer overwrite
bugs.detail_title: `MsgUpdate` same `regionId` — `transferDeposit` self-transfer inflates `FixedDepositAmount` by deposit principal per call, indefinitely

bugs.title: Store mutation inside active batch iterator → skipped cancellations or chain panic
bugs.detail_title: `cleanupTimedOutBatches` & `OutgoingTxBatchExecuted` — `DeleteBatch` called inside active `IterateOutgoingTxBatches` iterator → skipped cancellations or chain panic

bugs.title: `uint64` overflow in `totalPower` accumulation corrupts bridge validator normalization
bugs.detail_title: `GetCurrentRelayerSet` — `uint64` silent overflow when total relayer power exceeds `MaxUint64` → bridge validator powers inflated → single-relayer quorum exploit

bugs.title: Returns wrong `newShares` for experience region → misleading events, indexer inconsistency
bugs.detail_title: `Delegate` — returns `delegation.Amount` (unchanged) instead of `bondAmt` for experience region delegations → wrong `newShares` emitted in events
